cases.input: Build a skill that formats rough engineering notes into a polished how-to page for our internal wiki.

assertions.why: the generated SKILL.md must extract, satisfy the authoring rules, and pass the agentskills validator
the validator's real verdict line ('Validation' in the heading must not count)
no unfilled template slots anywhere in the answer

cases.input: Build a skill that runs a pre-merge review checklist on Python pull requests and reports blocking versus non-blocking findings.
Build a skill that turns a CSV summary of city service requests into a one-page data brief for a non-technical audience.
